description: Intelligent auto-fix scenarios — verifies the fix planner selects the right strategy based on investigation diagnosis

scenarios.description: Investigation finds bad image tag, auto-fix should roll back to previous revision.
scenarios.final_response: The pod api-server is in ImagePullBackOff because the image app:v999 does not exist in the registry. Rolled back deployment to previous revision (app:v2.0) which was the last known working image.

scenarios.description: Investigation finds OOM kill, auto-fix should double memory limit.
scenarios.final_response: The container was OOMKilled because it exceeded the 256Mi memory limit. Patched deployment to increase memory limit from 256Mi to 512Mi. The pod should stabilize after the rollout completes.

scenarios.description: Investigation finds missing ConfigMap, auto-fix cannot remediate — surfaces to user.
scenarios.final_response: The pod is crashlooping because ConfigMap 'app-config' is missing from namespace production. This requires manual intervention — create the ConfigMap with the expected keys.

scenarios.description: Investigation has low confidence, auto-fix falls back to blunt restart.
scenarios.final_response: Root cause unclear (confidence 0.3). Applied a rolling restart as a general remediation. If the issue persists after restart, manual investigation is needed.

scenarios.description: Auto-fix attempted twice and failed both times — stops retrying.
scenarios.final_response: Auto-fix exhausted after 2 attempts. The deployment api-server continues to fail. Root cause: missing database dependency. Manual intervention required.
